# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
  labels:
    app: web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-app
          image: your-registry/web-app:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /
              port: 80
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 20
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 2
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6.38
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          args:
            - -m
            - "256"
            - -I
            - 5m
            - -c
            - "1024"
            - -o
            - modern
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
  labels:
    app: background-workers
spec:
  replicas: 2
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-workers
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: background-workers
          image: your-registry/background-workers:latest
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          env:
            - name: MEMCACHED_HOST
              value: memcached
            - name: MEMCACHED_PORT
              value: "11211"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 512Mi
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - pgrep -f worker
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 20
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - sh
                - -c
                - pgrep -f worker
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - name: memcached
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
